Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Inspection Demands And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-06-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Jayme Faith C. Sagisi, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Maya Prickett
David Sidney Semel, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Gabriel Yu and Wai Hing Cheung

AFTER HEARING, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED WITH MODIFICATION.
Plaintiff Maya Prickett's motion to compel inspection demand is granted in part and denied in part. The inspection shall encompass the entryway and interior of 2709 20th Avenue and the rear stairs and pathway from the unit to the garbage bin area. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Order signed in open court.
MODIFICATION: INSPECTION MAY INCLUDE BACKYARD. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
